author: Forty41
msg: [Photo] Hi Danny, I was using this one too but the owner may take it down at some point if too many people use it and if it costs him to host it. I used Claude AI to build one for myself and it was really easy and you can just ask it to  do whatever you fancy.  I have it monitoring average rewards per connection for instance and to make suggestions for changes as well as monitoring daily, average rewards per phone, trends over time etc.  Mine is a bit more colourful but the important thing is the ease with which I made it.  You can then add it as an extension to Chrome and just upload your JSON daily.  It also keeps all previous days data.. I also ask it what enhancements it thinks it should make.

author: Miyagi Node
msg: Hello guys, what’s the best way to see my rewards analytics, I know there’s a couple people here with a way

author: Mr Roundry
msg: thats awsome man

author: Mr Roundry
msg: claude also showed you how to make the extension to chrome?

author: Forty41
msg: Yes it is very easy. Claude will create a file for you to download and you save it then unzip it and simply go into Manage Extensions and add the unzipped file.  If you get any errors just post them back into Claude and it will sort them.  The each day just upload your JSON.  If you have other data files like you have numbered your phones against each licence number just upload those files when you give Claude instructions.  You can keep revising and updating as you go.

author: OSUN
msg:
Hey everyone. 
Still setting up my 20 phone farm. Finally got them all switched over to English and connected to WiFi. 
What’s the best way to load the APK on genfarmer?
I tried copy and paste and even typing it in by hand but nothing is working.

author: Jaba - Unityfarmers
msg: Save the ApK on your computer. Select all the phones in Genfarmer. Right click and find the install files button. Select the file and there it goes
